plan_adherence_notes: Diffing `ff/Tbayes-market-eu0-v2-execute-step-2..HEAD` shows only task-artifact additions (`questions.json`, `research.json`, `plan.json`) and no production-code or regression-test edits. `backend/server.py` still materializes the EventTrade command before the market-status gate in `handle_event_trade(...)`, and `sync_account_exposure_state(...)` still eagerly calls `ensure_account_exposure_position(...)` before applying the shared netting projection, so planned steps 1 through 5 were not executed. The existing suite still passes unchanged via `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_bayes_market_api.py'` (214 tests, OK).
reason: The research and plan are coherent and aligned, but this branch never implements the requested EventTrade ordering or exposure-sync refactor. With no backend or test changes, the task objective remains unmet.
